seo.title: Ethan & Sons Electricians | Top-Rated Electrician in Addison, TX

hero.headline: Your Trusted Electrician in Addison, TX
hero.subheadline: Licensed, insured, and rated 4.8 stars – we fix it right the first time, every time.

featureSections.title: Fast, Safe, and Upfront Pricing
featureSections.body: We know electrical emergencies can't wait. That's why we offer same-day service and transparent quotes with no hidden fees. Our licensed electricians arrive on time, solve the problem, and leave your home cleaner than we found it.
featureSections.cardBody: Every job we complete comes with a full warranty. If something isn't right, we'll make it right – no questions asked.

featureSections.title: From Simple Repairs to Full Rewires
featureSections.body: Whether you need a ceiling fan installed, a panel upgrade, or whole-home surge protection, our experienced team handles it all. We use top-quality materials and follow code to ensure your family's safety.
featureSections.cardBody: All our electrical work meets or exceeds the latest National Electrical Code standards. Your safety is our priority.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: We carry full liability insurance and workers' comp, so you're never at risk.

whyChooseUs.title: Locally Owned
whyChooseUs.description: We're your neighbors in Addison, not a corporate chain. We care about our community.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
whyChooseUs.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait – and neither do we. Call anytime, day or night.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy with the work, we'll make it right. Over 500 five-star reviews prove it.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for a free estimate. No obligation, just honest advice.

servicesPage.intro: From minor fixes to major upgrades, our licensed electricians deliver safe, reliable solutions tailored to your home or business. Every service comes with a warranty and our 4.8-star commitment.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast diagnosis and repair for outages, flickering lights, dead outlets, and more.
services.longDescription: When something goes wrong with your electrical system, you need a pro who can find the root cause quickly. Our electricians use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues – from faulty wiring to overloaded circuits – and fix them right the first time. We handle everything from a single dead outlet to whole-house power failures, always with safety and code compliance in mind.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
All repairs backed by a satisfaction guarantee

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the problem using thermal imaging and circuit testers to identify the exact issue.

process.title: Plan
process.description: We explain the cause, show you options, and provide a fixed-price quote before any work begins.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our licensed electricians perform the repair safely and efficiently, then test everything to ensure it works perfectly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and typically arrive within 1-2 hours for urgent calls in Addison.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all repair and installation work.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety, capacity, and peace of mind.
services.longDescription: An outdated or undersized electrical panel is a fire hazard and can't handle modern power demands. Our team specializes in upgrading panels to 200 amps or more, ensuring your home meets current code and can support appliances, EV chargers, and electronics. We handle permits, inspections, and all utility coordination for a hassle-free experience.
benefits: Increases home safety and reduces fire risk

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel, load requirements, and future needs to recommend the right upgrade.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We pull all necessary permits and schedule inspections so you don't have to.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our electricians install the new panel with clean wiring, label circuits, and test everything before turning power back on.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most panel upgrades are completed in 4-8 hours. We work efficiently to minimize downtime.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, and we handle all permits and inspections to ensure the work is up to code.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting solutions – indoor and outdoor.
services.longDescription: Great lighting enhances safety, ambiance, and energy efficiency. Whether you want elegant recessed lighting, statement chandeliers, or landscape lighting that highlights your property, our designers and electricians bring your vision to life. We use energy-efficient LED fixtures and smart controls to give you convenience and savings.
benefits: Custom designs tailored to your style
Smart lighting for convenience and security

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your goals, measure spaces, and review fixture options to create a plan.

process.title: Design
process.description: Our team provides a layout and fixture selection, including dimmers and smart controls.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install all fixtures, run wiring neatly, and program smart features so everything works seamlessly.

faqs.question: Can you install outdoor lighting for security?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer motion-sensor lights, floodlights, and whole-property illumination for safety and aesthetics.

faqs.question: Do you install smart home lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and configure systems like Lutron, Philips Hue, and other smart platforms.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of Level 2 EV chargers for your home or business.
services.longDescription: Owning an electric vehicle means you need a reliable, fast charger at home. Our electricians install Level 2 chargers from top brands like Tesla, ChargePoint, and JuiceBox. We assess your panel capacity, run dedicated circuits, and mount the charger for optimal convenience. Plus, we help you take advantage of rebates and tax credits.
benefits: Eligible for federal and local incentives

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We inspect your panel, parking location, and existing wiring to determine the best setup.

process.title: Permitting & Rebates
process.description: We handle permits and help you apply for available rebates to offset costs.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: We install the charger, run the circuit, and test the system to ensure safe, reliable charging.

faqs.question: How much does EV charger installation cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary based on panel capacity and wiring distance. We provide a free estimate after assessment.

faqs.question: Can you install any brand of charger?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install all major brands and can recommend the best option for your vehicle and home.

about.headline: Family-Owned & Committed to Excellence
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable electrical services with integrity and transparency – treating every home like our own.
story: Ethan & Sons Electricians started in 1998 when founder Ethan Miller saw the need for honest, high-quality electrical work in Addison. With a small truck and a big dream, he built a reputation for showing up on time, fixing problems thoroughly, and never cutting corners. Over the years, his sons joined the business, bringing new skills and a shared passion for serving the community that raised them.

Today, we're a team of licensed electricians who take pride in our 4.8-star rating and over 500 glowing reviews. We invest in ongoing training, use the latest tools, and treat every customer like family. Whether it's a simple outlet repair or a full home rewiring, we bring the same dedication to every job – because your safety and satisfaction are our legacy.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We give honest advice and fair pricing – no upsells, no surprises.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every job meets or exceeds code. We never compromise on safety.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Our work is clean, precise, and built to last. We take pride in every detail.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local schools, charities, and neighbors because Addison is our home too.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call us or fill out the form – we'll respond within 24 hours.
